# subset_h5 { #lfpack.subset_h5 }

```python
subset_h5(src_h5, dst_h5, recordings, missing='raise')
```

Copy a subset of recordings out of a multi-recording HDF5 archive.

The inverse of ``merge_h5``: instead of combining several single-recording
files, this pulls selected top-level groups out of one already-merged
archive, e.g. to carve a smaller public release (BWM) out of a larger
internal superset (ephys-atlas). No re-compression is performed.

## Parameters {.doc-section .doc-section-parameters}

| Name       | Type                  | Description                                                                                                                                    | Default    |
|------------|-----------------------|------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|------------|
| src_h5     | path - like           | Source multi-recording HDF5 file.                                                                                                              | _required_ |
| dst_h5     | path - like           | Output HDF5 file (always created fresh).                                                                                                       | _required_ |
| recordings | sequence of str       | Recording (top-level group) names to copy, in the given order.                                                                                 | _required_ |
| missing    | (\'raise\', \'warn\') | How to handle names in *recordings* absent from *src_h5*. ``"raise"`` (default) raises ValueError; ``"warn"`` prints a warning and skips them. | `"raise"`  |

## Returns {.doc-section .doc-section-returns}

| Name   | Type   | Description                |
|--------|--------|----------------------------|
|        | Path   | Resolved path to *dst_h5*. |

## Raises {.doc-section .doc-section-raises}

| Name   | Type       | Description                                                                                                                        |
|--------|------------|------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|
|        | ValueError | If *missing* is ``"raise"`` and some *recordings* are absent from *src_h5*, or if *missing* is neither ``"raise"`` nor ``"warn"``. |
